---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="hero">

# Projects

</div>

<div class="grid">

<div class="card">
<h3>Project 1</h3>
<p>Short description.</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>Project 2</h3>
<p>Short description.</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>Project 3</h3>
<p>Short description.</p>
</div>

</div>
